calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd. #218 At 9:00 A.M.
Off Calendar Sep-05-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, and CSR: Breda Fields.
Appearances: Walter Curtis Cook, Esq. For Plaintiff Sylvie Forsmann also present, was sworn and examined.
Defendant not present.
The Court hears evidence and testimony by the witness, grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant, Kenneth Longacre.
The Court to consider the amount of award, counsel to prepare a proposed jugement with BLANKS for General Damages, Special Damages, Punitive Damages, Costs and Attorney's fees.
Matter is under submission.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
